name: as_flow-marketplace

plugins.name: as_flow
plugins.description: Three-Phase Flow methodology for solo+AI development: feature-level product spec generation with hierarchical fork discovery (8-category probing taxonomy + HAZOP guidewords + premortem). Currently includes feature-spec skill; product-spec, arch-spec, impl-plan, fitness, sanity-check, handoff are parked for future iterations.
